conversation_context.user_goal: Preserve concise conversation intent across agents without weakening the write-track command and verification record.
user_constraints: Keep only the user's ask, stated preferences, and locked decisions.
Do not replace technical write evidence with conversational summaries.
decisions: Write-track records will use the same hybrid context pattern: `status.json` plus `handoff.md`.
conversation_context.latest_user_request: Continue by making row insert/delete honest and implementable in the SDK without pretending exact table/row addressing exists yet.
